=== Effect Flow ===

Location: 4:28 - 8:2
Root: Effect.succeed(1).pipe(\n  Effect.map((x) => x + 1),\n  Effect.map((x) => x.toString()),\n  Effect.map((x) => x.length > 0)\n)
Path (6 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=boolean E=never R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A=1} 1
      ~> [call] -> [2]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [3]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [4]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [5]
  [5] pipeTransformation {effect A=boolean E=never R=never} step 3: Effect.map
